verifier.py explicitly checks file removal logic, preservation of initial files, and report file generation with specific text constraints.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real X-Ray Angiography (XA) sample DICOM files downloaded from rubomedical.com (0002.DCM and 0003.DCM). The metadata incorrectly claims the task injects 4 MR brain scan files into a CT chest directory; in reality, setup_task.sh downloads and injects exactly 1 contaminant file (0003.DCM) into a directory containing 1 legitimate file (0002.DCM). Furthermore, both the legitimate and contaminant files share the exact same Modality ('XA') and PatientName ('Rubo DEMO') tags, contradicting the metadata's claim that they differ in Modality and PatientName. They only differ by PatientID and StudyDescription. The expected target, quarantine, and report paths strictly match the metadata definitions and are explicitly enforced by export_result.sh and verifier.py.
